name: agent-workflow
description: Role-based multi-agent workflow skills for discovery, phased handoff, cross-lineage implementation review plus Nitpicker hard gates, phase-cycle orchestration, ZRT commit closeout, and compaction resume with explicit reviewer provenance and raw evidence.

interface.shortDescription: Multi-agent workflow skills for phased implementation, orchestration, commit closeout, and compaction-resume.
interface.longDescription: Use role-based Discovery, Planner, Implementer, cross-lineage Reviewer, Nitpicker, phase-cycle orchestration, ZRT commit closeout, and compaction-resume workflows across Codex and Claude. Reviewer tool, CLI version, lineage, model, reviewed SHA and paths, enum verdict, exit code, and raw output remain auditable. A shared SessionStart(compact) hook injects live git facts and boot context after compaction.
defaultPrompt: Use phased implementation handoff for the next phase.
Use phase-cycle-orchestrator to run the next phase loop.
압축 준비해. 문서와 허용된 메모리를 동기화하고 압축 후 재개 프롬프트를 만들어줘.
